description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by a tall, dense green hedge, creating a private courtyard environment. The property features a single-story structure with flat roofs, large windows, and multiple outdoor living spaces, including a central patio with seating and a pool area. The main building is divided into two distinct sections, connected by a covered walkway and bordered by lush landscaping and palm trees. The outdoor area includes a paved path, a shaded pergola, and a separate pool zone with lounge chairs. The bungalow's exterior is finished in light, neutral tones, with glass and metal accents visible on doors and windows. The overall layout emphasizes open space, privacy, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, and a private courtyard surrounded by tall hedges, featuring a central patio, pool, and lush landscaping.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from the front, highlighting the main entrance, central patio, and pool area, with the hedge enclosure and outdoor seating clearly visible.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the rear of the bungalow, revealing the back entrances, a secondary building section, and the pool area set apart from the main structure.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the side of the bungalow, focusing on the open courtyard, outdoor dining area, and the connection between the two main building sections.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a perspective from the opposite side, emphasizing the paved walkway, pergola, and the relationship between the main living spaces and the garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
